features: Fix: Align SentinelOne EDR paths to ~/runningpoc/bin/lfr-tunnel for 100% execution immunity
Feature: Add AssociatedBundleIdentifiers to macOS LaunchAgent plists for clean System Settings presentation
Refactor: Convert Client SPA Inspector header navigation and cards to CSS theme variables for Light/Dark mode
Docs: Add subcommands listing to lfr-tunnel --help
Fix: Resolve unreplaced {{LFR_TUNNEL_MACOS_ARM64_INSTALL_DIR}} template placeholders during direct raw install script execution
Feature: Namespace all install script placeholders and operational environment variables with explicit LFR_TUNNEL_ prefix
Fix: Gracefully skip Windows binary codesigning when certificate parameters are set to skip
Docs: Document InfoSec and EDR environment variable namespacing standards
Refactor: Systematically refactor all 20 V2 portal UI components to CSS utility classes and design tokens
Feature: Restore complete V1 feature parity across Account Settings, Admin Users, and Personal Access Tokens
UX: Premium dark, light, and Liferay Waffle theme styling without inline style overhead
Feature: Restore V1 theme preferences (System Default, Time of Day) in V2 settings context
Feature: Restore First Name, Last Name, and Email Notifications form details under Profile Settings
Fix: Resolve permissions and EDR restrictions on self-upgrades by migrating client installation fallbacks to user-space ~/runningpoc/bin
Fix: Align layouts, flex dimensions, and download icons for Export PDF and Export CSV buttons across all Admin Zone pages
Feature: Restore complete V1 Domain Allocation Rules options list and hyphenated server keys
Fix: Resolve soft maintenance active status parsing and GET details endpoint variables mapping
Feature: Add dynamic client update warning alert banner in Dashboard Overview
Feature: Restrict main Dashboard Overview to the logged-in user's personal tunnels, subdomains, and access tokens (#762)
Feature: Introduce Admin Tokens management page under Admin Zone to view, search, extend, and revoke user PATs globally (#762)
Refactor: Extract hardcoded server, status, and portal URLs into centralized metadata configuration constants (#760)
Fix: Enable native Go cross-compilation in Dockerfile to prevent QEMU emulated build hangs (#758)
Feature: Add Personal Access Tokens management (extend and revoke) inside Admin Users details modal to restore V1 functional parity (#756)
Fix: Resolve Personal Access Tokens table column mapping to display Name and Prefix (#749)
Feature: Show all registered Subdomain Reservations in Admin Subdomains list with Online/Offline status badges (#750)
Feature: Add global Top Tunnels by Bandwidth doughnut chart in Admin Analytics statistics (#751)
Fix: Map system Audit Log Actor and Resource table columns to backend fields (#752)
Fix: Implement client-side YAML formatter for Server Configuration display in Settings (#753)
Feature: Shift Personal Access Tokens CSV generation to a server-side route (#735)
Feature: Add active subdomains CSV download capability in active subdomains dashboard (#735)
Fix: Aligned PDF print layout elements and styling for cleaner multi-page reports (#735)
Fix: Restore Users list Last Seen and Quota details columns, and add quota settings and reset MFA inside User Details Modal (#737)
Fix: Restore Subdomains quarantined/extension requested statuses, Extend reservation trigger, and CLI copy utilities (#738)
Fix: Align router segment checks to support both tunnels-limit and tunnels_limit validation formats (#737)
Fix: Redirect trailing slashes on control plane static pages to prevent proxy 502 Bad Gateway (#734)
Feature: Add global Playwright exception guardian to detect browser-side exceptions (#732)
Fix: Handle optional token status in V2 Dashboard mapping (#732)
Feature: Eliminate Flash of Untranslated Content (FOUC) and CLS on setup/dashboard pages (#698)
Feature: Add All Users vs Pending Registrations sub-tabs and count badges inside V2 Portal (#697)
Release v1.43.4
Fix: Resolve IP Blacklist input form visual styles
Fix: Correct Admin Settings table column headers and export button
Feature: Add active rule to sync branch before PR
Fix: Migrate language and theme preferences to account settings
Fix: Resolve sidebar navigation wrapping bug on V2 portal
